allow: PowerShell($smokeDir = "$env:TEMP\\rageval_smoke_test"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $smokeDir -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory $smokeDir | Out-Null; Set-Location $smokeDir; rageval init; Write-Host "--- files created ---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
